understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on the current BP35 level (and then subsequent levels) without dying, using at most 2 attempts per level and within the 50-turn limit per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN or CLICK a tile). After a move, gravity (shown as a direction, e.g., DOWN) pulls the player along that direction until they land on solid ground/support, which can cause large position changes after a single step. CLICK removes specific clickable tiles at the targeted coordinates (changing the terrain for future movement/falls) but does not move the player directly. Landing on a spike/hazard tile immediately ends the attempt/run. Undo, when available, would revert the most recent action/state (position, removed tiles, and gravity effects) to let you correct mistakes within the attempt.
